item.title: ZapCon 21
item.description: ZapCon ‘21 was scheduled on 9th March 2021 What was interesting Robot Framework Democratizing ZAP with test automation and DSLs by Abhay Bhargav BDD (Behaviour Driven Development) in IT-Security apparently, there’s this robotframework which makes writing test cases in quite a simple way, and you can run pentests on your UI application Why using a DAST scanner? DAST (Dynamic Application Security Testing) keeps app secure:

item.title: Security Tools
item.description: I never had the chance to compact a list of available Security tools in Q1 2021, here it goes. If something’s missing from this list, anyone can freely open a PR and I’ll gladly update the list. Security tooling available By attending the ZapCon ‘21, I’ve received a feedback request email from them where I should list security tools I’ve used in the past. Name Pricing model checkmarx.

item.title: IstioCon 21
item.description: ICYMI, IstioCon ‘21 was happening previous week 22-26 Feb 2021. Luckily the videos are still there, so if you want to check what’s been discussed you can still do it, it’s nice that you can login with  Apple ID also 😉 Talks I found interesting I want to sketch a mesh for you - by Christian Posta ✨ installing the Istio control plane with the revision flag istioctl install .

item.title: Hello World
item.description: It’s very interesting sometimes to test Golang blogging platforms This is a sample YAML manifest 😄 {{- if (and (ne (.Values.ui.ingress.enabled | toString ) "-") .Values.ui.ingress.enabled) }} {{- $serviceName := printf "%s-%s" (include "vault.fullname" .) "ui" -}} apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1 kind: Ingress metadata: name: {{ template "vault.fullname" . }}-ingress namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }} labels: app: {{ template "vault.name" . }} chart: {{ template "vault.chart" . }} heritage: {{ .Release.Service }} release: {{ .

item.title: About
item.description: What started as a curiosity to decompose everything as a child, materialised itself into the first computer I owned. That’s when I was continously breaking and fixing it multiple times made me discover how everything works. I’m Daniel, a Site Reliability Engineer working @ GfK SE based in Germany, let me invite you into my world ✨ My experience 😎 The first real IT job I landed was a Ruby on Rails developer at MarketsWorld which was a trading platform based in Isle of Man 🇬🇧.
